sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16647" key="a)stroqesi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀστρο-θεσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n16647.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">group of stars, constellation,</tr_> Ath.II. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4066.tlg002:490f" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">490f</biblScope> </bibl>; <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arrangement of planets,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:157:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157.24</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
